recommendations.title: Roadgames
recommendations.overview: A truck driver plays a cat-and-mouse game with a mysterious serial killer in a van who lures young female hitchhiker victims on a desolate Australian highway.

recommendations.title: Link
recommendations.overview: Young graduate student Jane Chase becomes the new assistant to an eccentric zoology professor at the remote home he shares with two brilliant chimpanzees and an elderly orangutan butler named Link. But when one of the chimps is found dead and the pro

recommendations.title: F/X2
recommendations.overview: F/X man Rollie Tyler is now a toymaker. Mike, the ex-husband of his girlfriend Kim, is a cop. He asks Rollie to help catch a killer. The operation goes well until some unknown man kills both the killer and Mike. Mike's boss, Silak says it was the kil

recommendations.title: Fright Night
recommendations.overview: Charley Brewster, a high school student, accidentally discovers the true and creepy nature of Jerry Dandrige, his dashing and enigmatic new neighbor; but no one seems willing to believe him.

recommendations.title: Cloak & Dagger
recommendations.overview: Davey Osborne is an average 11-year-old boy with an overactive imagination. He spends his days playing video games and pretending to be a spy with his imaginary father-figure, Jack Flack - a substitute for his real father, who is struggling with the

recommendations.title: Psycho
recommendations.overview: When larcenous real estate clerk Marion Crane goes on the lam with a wad of cash and hopes of starting a new life, she ends up at the notorious Bates Motel, where manager Norman Bates cares for his housebound mother.

recommendations.title: Child's Play
recommendations.overview: After being shot in a toy store, a serial killer transfers his soul into a Good Guy doll. A mother then gifts it to her 6-year old son Andy, which unleashes terror upon the city.

recommendations.title: Psycho III
recommendations.overview: When Maureen Coyle, a suicidal nun who resembles Norman's former victim, Marion Crane, arrives at the motel, all bets are off and "Mother" is less than happy.

recommendations.title: Angst
recommendations.overview: A killer is released from prison and breaks into a remote home to kill a woman, her handicapped son and her pretty daughter.

recommendations.title: Quién te cantará
recommendations.overview: Lila, a famous retired singer, loses her memory after suffering an accident, just as she planned her return to the stage.
